title: German Toast Pancakes
description: A twist on traditional pancakes, these German toast pancakes are a delicious breakfast option. With toasted German bread and topped with a sweet pancake, this dish is sure to please.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine the flour and yeast.
Gradually add the milk and mix until a smooth batter forms.
Add the eggs, one at a time, and mix well after each addition.
Add the melted butter and mix until fully incorporated.
Add the sugar and mix until combined.
Heat a non-stick pan or griddle over medium heat.
Drop the batter by 1/4 cupfuls onto the pan and cook for 2-3 minutes, or until bubbles appear on the surface.
Flip the pancakes and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, or until golden brown.
To assemble the German toast pancakes, toast the German bread and top with a pancake.
